## Type

- [ ] Bugfix

## Problem

Describe the bug, impact, and how to reproduce.

## Root Cause

Explain what caused the issue.

## Solution

Describe how this PR fixes the issue.

## Risk & Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:

## Validation

- [ ] Reproduced bug before fix
- [ ] Verified bug no longer occurs
- [ ] Added/updated test to prevent regression
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
